positive: A maximalist, symmetrical, neo-art nouveau decorative arrangement of intertwining floral elements and celestial bodies. The composition features stylized lotuses, iridescent crescent moons, and trailing vines forming a complex, ornate mandala pattern. The color palette is deep sapphire blue, antique gold, emerald green, and touches of brilliant opal white. The style is highly graphic and tattoo-inspired, with crisp, defined silhouettes and strong black outlines. The composition should be centered and suitable for scaling onto apparel. Intricate filigree details, vector art quality, deep contrast, elegant symmetry, symmetrical radial layout.
negative: blur, noise, watermark, text, signature, logo, amateur, graffiti, photorealistic, low contrast, bad anatomy, extra limbs, dirty, sloppy, gradient, grayscale
